items.title: Interface Systems Strengthens Alarm Monitoring Against Cellular Jamming and Break-Ins
items.author: Not Specified
items.description: Interface Systems announced the integration of JamAlert™ cellular jammer detection technology with its TamperShield™ alarm monitoring service. The combined solution detects criminal attempts to disable alarm systems using cellular interference before break-ins occur, providing early warning, continuous monitoring, video verification, and faster law enforcement response for retail, financial, and museum environments.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Honeywell is mentioned as compatible with the new solution but plays a passive role. The integration supports existing Honeywell systems without requiring replacement, which is neither particularly beneficial nor detrimental to the company.
